entries.author: HQIV

curvature_norm_combinatorial.desc: Combinatorial curvature norm N67 = 6^7 √3 from discrete null lattice (Lean OctonionicLightCone)
curvature_norm_combinatorial.name: curvature_norm_combinatorial

derived_proton_mass_MeV.desc: Proton mass anchor formally derived from Lean (DerivedNucleonMass + tuft etc)
derived_proton_mass_MeV.name: derived_proton_mass_MeV

lapse_factor_ref_point.desc: ADM lapse at canonical reference-like point (Lean HQVMetric / HQVM_lapse)
lapse_factor_ref_point.name: lapse_factor_ref_point

omega_k_at_horizon_self.desc: Ω_k(N;N) must be exactly 1 at the horizon (Lean theorem omega_k_at_horizon_self)
omega_k_at_horizon_self.name: omega_k_at_horizon_self

omega_k_partial_at_reference.desc: Ω_k at lock-in/reference shell relative to itself (Lean omega_k_lockin_calibration)
omega_k_partial_at_reference.name: omega_k_partial_at_reference

reference_m.desc: Lock-in shell index (qcdShell + lattice steps) — changing this is a major formal shift
reference_m.name: reference_m

so8_dim.desc: so(8) Lie closure dimension (Lean SO8Closure + triality + GeneratorsLieClosure)
so8_dim.name: so8_dim

alpha_GUT.desc: GUT coupling from Lean β-running engine (1/42 in paper)
alpha_GUT.name: alpha_GUT

available_modes_ref.desc: Combinatorial mode count at reference shell (Lean lattice)
available_modes_ref.name: available_modes_ref

bbn_eta10.desc: Baryon-to-photon ratio η × 10^10 at BBN/CMB from HQIV first-principles (dynamic shell integrator: curvature shells + vev + binding feedback + seed imprint over QCD-to-lock-in window). Paper script hqiv_dynamic_bulk_bbn.py gives ~6.19782 (not 6.10).
bbn_eta10.name: bbn_eta10

cmb_birefringence_z.desc: CMB birefringence β (deg) at now from HQIV (α imprint + self-clock; paper script 0.379 deg). Python current 0.3 from witness. Agrees with obs within ~0.4σ per paper.
cmb_birefringence_z.name: cmb_birefringence_z

deuteron_binding_z.desc: Deuteron total binding B (MeV) from Lean spectraDeuteronBinding_MeV witness vs AME2020 (with real exp σ). Heavier-nuclei ladder polish remains a separate Arena target.
deuteron_binding_z.name: deuteron_binding_z

flatness_tuning_exponent.desc: Tuning exponent for initial curvature to produce observed near-flat universe today. HQIV dynamics from lattice gives natural small Omega_k(now) ~ paper value 0.0098 (agrees with Planck/bounds).
flatness_tuning_exponent.name: flatness_tuning_exponent

free_neutron_half_life.desc: Free n lifetime (beta decay) from G_F^2 m_e^5 |M|^2 scaffold + ladder (isotope_ladder + hqiv_nuclear_spectra). Matches experiment to ~0.16% in current ladder (benchmark).
free_neutron_half_life.name: free_neutron_half_life

hep_decay_panel_max_z.desc: Max n_σ on curated 17-channel HEP branching panel (published max ~0.86σ, all within 3σ).
hep_decay_panel_max_z.name: hep_decay_panel_max_z

hep_decay_panel_mean_z.desc: Mean n_σ on curated 17-channel heavy-flavour branching panel (HEP decay readout paper; MC witness propagation, PDG quarantined).
hep_decay_panel_mean_z.name: hep_decay_panel_mean_z

hep_decay_structural_pass_rate.desc: Fraction of HEP benchmark structural/witness cases passing (published 81/81 zero structural failures).
hep_decay_structural_pass_rate.name: hep_decay_structural_pass_rate

hierarchy_tuning_exponent.desc: Hierarchy tuning exponent: HQIV derives weak/Planck (and GUT) scale separation from lock-in m~4 + discrete counts without quadratic tuning. Matches paper derivations of m_p, alpha_GUT.
hierarchy_tuning_exponent.name: hierarchy_tuning_exponent

miniprotein_fold_pass_fraction.desc: Fraction of miniprotein audit targets passing per-target Cα RMSD gates (published: 11/11).
miniprotein_fold_pass_fraction.name: miniprotein_fold_pass_fraction

miniprotein_mean_ca_rmsd.desc: Mean Cα RMSD across 11-target miniprotein audit panel (PDB/COD witnesses grade HQIV fold readouts only; 11/11 pass at published gates).
miniprotein_mean_ca_rmsd.name: miniprotein_mean_ca_rmsd

miniprotein_trp_cage_ca_rmsd.desc: Trp-cage (20-mer) Cα RMSD vs PDB witness — hardest miniprotein target in the published ladder.
miniprotein_trp_cage_ca_rmsd.name: miniprotein_trp_cage_ca_rmsd

omega_k_present_now.desc: Present-day Ω_k z-score vs Planck band (prediction ~0.0098; |Ω_k|<~0.02). Horizon-self Ω_k(N;N)=1 is a separate protected theorem.
omega_k_present_now.name: omega_k_present_now

orbital_flyby_sparc_model_residual.desc: SPARC catalog median χ²_red(HQIV) / median χ²_red(baryonic) — lower means HQIV inertia screening beats baryons-only (published ~0.31).
orbital_flyby_sparc_model_residual.name: orbital_flyby_sparc_model_residual

paper_comparisons_max_abs_z.desc: Max | (HQIV derived - exp) / published_1σ | across binding energies, half-lives, masses, BBN η, CMB etc. from the master paper-comparison suite. Core Arena 'sigma everywhere' driver.
paper_comparisons_max_abs_z.name: paper_comparisons_max_abs_z

proton_electron_mass_ratio.desc: m_p / m_e from HQIV resonance ladder + nucleon binding (tuft + SM_GR_Unification papers)
proton_electron_mass_ratio.name: proton_electron_mass_ratio

tuft_hopf_kappa6_correction.desc: TUFT Hopf κ₆ = η_paper × γ × C₂ (C2 = lapse conc at lock-in) for advanced mass/binding corrections in papers. Python now mirrors Lean.
tuft_hopf_kappa6_correction.name: tuft_hopf_kappa6_correction

vacuum_energy_discrepancy.desc: Vacuum energy density from finite sum ½ N(m) ω(m) over causal modes 0 to m_now (matches paper kirchhoff_finite_mode script). HQIV gives observed small value naturally.
vacuum_energy_discrepancy.name: vacuum_energy_discrepancy

entries.note: Bundled from local pyhqiv baseline until main refresh after push.
